name: TA Barkeyville
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America at I-80 Exit 29 with a Country Pride restaurant, fuel, showers, laundry, truck service bays and a CAT Scale.

name: Kwik Fill Auto/Truck Plaza
description: Veteran-owned independent truck plaza at I-80 Exit 29 offering diesel, overnight parking, showers, restaurant, a certified scale and tire repair.

name: Emlenton Truck Plaza
description: Independent Pilot-branded truck plaza at I-80 Exit 42 with 24-hour diesel and restaurant, roughly 75 truck spaces, showers, laundry and a CAT Scale.

name: Clarion Travel Plaza
description: Newer travel plaza at I-80 Exit 62 (Trinity Point) reported open with fuel, several fast-food outlets and a small truck stop component.

name: Flying J Travel Center #707
description: Pilot Flying J travel center at I-80 Exit 78 with 12 fuel lanes, ~140 truck spaces, 15 showers, Denny's, laundry and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #829
description: Love's Travel Stop opened 2022 at I-80 Exit 81 with 130 truck spaces, 7 showers, Wendy's, laundry, a CAT Scale and a co-located Speedco service bay.

name: Pilot Travel Center #336
description: Pilot Travel Center at I-80 Exit 97 (US-219) with 7 diesel lanes, ~100 truck spaces, 7 showers, laundry and a CAT Scale.

name: Sheetz Travel Center - Falls Creek
description: Sheetz travel center at I-80 Exit 97 (US-219) offering diesel, truck parking, showers, a driver lounge and food.

name: CAT Scale at TA Barkeyville
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Barkeyville travel center at I-80 Exit 29.

name: CAT Scale at Emlenton Truck Plaza
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Emlenton Truck Plaza at I-80 Exit 42.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Brookville
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J Travel Center at I-80 Exit 78.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Brookville
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop #829 at I-80 Exit 81.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot DuBois
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot Travel Center at I-80 Exit 97 (US-219).

name: Hurricane Truck Wash
description: 24-hour self-serve truck and trailer wash located about a quarter-mile south of I-80 Exit 78 on PA-36.

name: Speedco at Love's #829
description: Speedco truck-service bay co-located at Love's Travel Stop #829 (Exit 81) providing tire repair, oil/lube and light truck service.

name: Clarion Weigh Station (Eastbound)
description: Permanent PennDOT/PSP fixed-scale weigh station on I-80 eastbound in Clarion County near mile marker 55, with irregular operating hours.

name: Clarion Weigh Station (Westbound)
description: Permanent PennDOT/PSP fixed-scale weigh station on I-80 westbound in Clarion County near mile marker 55, with irregular operating hours.

name: I-80 Welcome Center (West Middlesex)
description: PennDOT I-80 eastbound Welcome Center/rest area in Mercer County near the Ohio line, reopened May 2025 after renovation, with restrooms and limited parking.

name: I-80 Rest Area (Jefferson County)
description: PennDOT I-80 rest area in Jefferson County (about a mile east of Exit 86 eastbound, with a westbound counterpart) offering restrooms and parking.
